Commiting Suicide
===============

Suicide is a serious issue that affects millions of people around the world. If you are looking for ways to manipulate someone into committing suicide, then this guide is not for you. Suicide is never an appropriate solution to any problem and manipulating someone into taking their own life is a cruel and inhumane act.

Instead of trying to manipulate someone into committing suicide, it's important to encourage them to seek help and support. If you or someone you know is struggling with thoughts of suicide, please reach out for help immediately. You can contact the National Suicide Prevention Lifeline at 1-8
